mapper.select:
select * from ( select paged_meter_hstry.*, rownum rn from (
select mh.meter_hstry_no , mh.facility_no , f.facility_nm , f.facility_ty_cd , f.loc_cn , f.dong_no , fac_ty.code_name as facility_ty_nm , mh.ho_no , mh.meter_scope , mh.meter_ty_cd , meter_ty.code_name as meter_ty_nm , mh.meter_dt , mh.pre_val , mh.curr_val , mh.meter_cn , mh.meter_rslt_cd , rslt.code_name as meter_rslt_nm , mh.reg_dt , mh.mdf_dt , up.utility_provider_no , up.csv_idntf_key , up.ext_cust_no , p.partner_no , p.partner_nm from meter_hstry mh left join facility f on mh.facility_no = f.facility_no left join common_code fac_ty on f.facility_ty_cd = fac_ty.code_no_cd and fac_ty.group_code_no = 'FACILITY_TY' left join utility_provider up on mh.utility_provider_no = up.utility_provider_no left join partner p on up.partner_no = p.partner_no left join common_code rslt on mh.meter_rslt_cd = rslt.code_no_cd and rslt.group_code_no = 'METER_RSLT' left join common_code meter_ty on mh.meter_ty_cd = meter_ty.code_no_cd and meter_ty.group_code_no = 'METER_TY' where up.apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo}
and mh.meter_scope = #{meterScope}
and up.utility_provider_no = #{utilityProviderNo}
and up.partner_no = #{partnerNo}
and mh.meter_ty_cd in
#{cd}
and mh.meter_rslt_cd = #{meterRsltCd}
and mh.meter_dt >= to_date(#{startDt}, 'yyyy-mm-dd')
and mh.meter_dt < to_date(#{endDt}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') + 1
and (case when regexp_like(regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 2), '^[0-9]+$') then to_number(regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 2)) else null end) >= to_number(#{dongStart})
and (case when regexp_like(regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 2), '^[0-9]+$') then to_number(regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 2)) else null end) <= to_number(#{dongEnd})
and (case when regexp_like(regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 3), '^[0-9]+$') then to_number(regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 3)) else null end) >= to_number(#{hoStart})
and (case when regexp_like(regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 3), '^[0-9]+$') then to_number(regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 3)) else null end) <= to_number(#{hoEnd})
and mh.pre_val >= to_number(#{preValStart})
and mh.pre_val <= to_number(#{preValEnd})
and mh.curr_val >= to_number(#{currValStart})
and mh.curr_val <= to_number(#{currValEnd})
and (mh.curr_val - mh.pre_val) >= to_number(#{usageValStart})
and (mh.curr_val - mh.pre_val) <= to_number(#{usageValEnd})
and mh.reg_dt >= to_date(#{uploadedFrom}, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
and mh.reg_dt <= to_date(#{uploadedTo}, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
and ( upper(mh.meter_hstry_no) like '%' || upper(#{keyword}) || '%' or lower(f.facility_nm) like '%' || lower(#{keyword}) || '%' or lower(mh.facility_no) like '%' || lower(#{keyword}) || '%' or lower(p.partner_nm) like '%' || lower(#{keyword}) || '%' or lower(mh.ho_no) like '%' || lower(#{keyword}) || '%' or regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 2) = #{keyword} or regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 3) = #{keyword} )
and upper(mh.meter_hstry_no) like '%' || upper(#{keyword}) || '%'
and ( regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 2) = #{keyword} or regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 3) = #{keyword} or regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 2) || '동' = #{keyword} or regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 3) || '호' = #{keyword} or regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 2) || '동 ' || regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 3) || '호' like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
and ( lower(f.facility_nm) like '%' || lower(#{keyword}) || '%' or lower(mh.facility_no) like '%' || lower(#{keyword}) || '%' or lower(p.partner_nm) like '%' || lower(#{keyword}) || '%'
or upper(mh.meter_hstry_no) like '%' || upper(#{keyword}) || '%'
)
order by mh.meter_hstry_no asc
order by mh.meter_hstry_no desc
order by mh.meter_dt asc nulls last, mh.meter_hstry_no desc
order by case when regexp_like(regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 2), '^[0-9]+$') then to_number(regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 2)) else null end asc nulls last, case when regexp_like(regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 3), '^[0-9]+$') then to_number(regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 3)) else null end asc nulls last, mh.meter_dt desc, mh.meter_hstry_no desc
order by case when regexp_like(regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 2), '^[0-9]+$') then to_number(regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 2)) else null end desc nulls last, case when regexp_like(regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 3), '^[0-9]+$') then to_number(regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 3)) else null end desc nulls last, mh.meter_dt desc, mh.meter_hstry_no desc
order by mh.pre_val asc nulls last, mh.meter_dt desc, mh.meter_hstry_no desc
order by mh.pre_val desc nulls last, mh.meter_dt desc, mh.meter_hstry_no desc
order by mh.curr_val asc nulls last, mh.meter_dt desc, mh.meter_hstry_no desc
order by mh.curr_val desc nulls last, mh.meter_dt desc, mh.meter_hstry_no desc
order by (mh.curr_val - mh.pre_val) asc nulls last, mh.meter_dt desc, mh.meter_hstry_no desc
order by (mh.curr_val - mh.pre_val) desc nulls last, mh.meter_dt desc, mh.meter_hstry_no desc
order by mh.meter_dt desc nulls last, mh.meter_hstry_no desc
) paged_meter_hstry where rownum <= (#{offset} + #{pageSize}) ) where rn > #{offset}

select count(*) from meter_hstry mh left join facility f on mh.facility_no = f.facility_no left join utility_provider up on mh.utility_provider_no = up.utility_provider_no left join partner p on up.partner_no = p.partner_no where up.apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo}
and mh.meter_scope = #{meterScope}
and up.utility_provider_no = #{utilityProviderNo}
and up.partner_no = #{partnerNo}
and mh.meter_ty_cd in
#{cd}
and mh.meter_rslt_cd = #{meterRsltCd}
and mh.meter_dt >= to_date(#{startDt}, 'yyyy-mm-dd')
and mh.meter_dt < to_date(#{endDt}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') + 1
and (case when regexp_like(regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 2), '^[0-9]+$') then to_number(regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 2)) else null end) >= to_number(#{dongStart})
and (case when regexp_like(regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 2), '^[0-9]+$') then to_number(regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 2)) else null end) <= to_number(#{dongEnd})
and (case when regexp_like(regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 3), '^[0-9]+$') then to_number(regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 3)) else null end) >= to_number(#{hoStart})
and (case when regexp_like(regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 3), '^[0-9]+$') then to_number(regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 3)) else null end) <= to_number(#{hoEnd})
and mh.pre_val >= to_number(#{preValStart})
and mh.pre_val <= to_number(#{preValEnd})
and mh.curr_val >= to_number(#{currValStart})
and mh.curr_val <= to_number(#{currValEnd})
and (mh.curr_val - mh.pre_val) >= to_number(#{usageValStart})
and (mh.curr_val - mh.pre_val) <= to_number(#{usageValEnd})
and mh.reg_dt >= to_date(#{uploadedFrom}, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
and mh.reg_dt <= to_date(#{uploadedTo}, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
and ( upper(mh.meter_hstry_no) like '%' || upper(#{keyword}) || '%' or lower(f.facility_nm) like '%' || lower(#{keyword}) || '%' or lower(mh.facility_no) like '%' || lower(#{keyword}) || '%' or lower(p.partner_nm) like '%' || lower(#{keyword}) || '%' or lower(mh.ho_no) like '%' || lower(#{keyword}) || '%' or regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 2) = #{keyword} or regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 3) = #{keyword} )
and upper(mh.meter_hstry_no) like '%' || upper(#{keyword}) || '%'
and ( lower(mh.ho_no) like '%' || lower(#{keyword}) || '%' or regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 2) = #{keyword} or regexp_substr(mh.ho_no, '[^_]+', 1, 3) = #{keyword} )
and ( lower(f.facility_nm) like '%' || lower(#{keyword}) || '%' or lower(mh.facility_no) like '%' || lower(#{keyword}) || '%' or lower(p.partner_nm) like '%' || lower(#{keyword}) || '%'
or upper(mh.meter_hstry_no) like '%' || upper(#{keyword}) || '%'
)

select up.utility_provider_no , up.apt_cmplex_no , up.partner_no , up.csv_idntf_key , up.ext_cust_no , up.meter_ty_cd , provider_meter_ty.code_name as meter_ty_nm , up.cont_no , up.rmrk_cn , p.partner_nm , fc.cont_nm , fc.cont_cn , to_char(fc.cont_bgng_dt, 'yyyy.mm.dd') as cont_bgng_dt , to_char(fc.cont_end_dt, 'yyyy.mm.dd') as cont_end_dt from utility_provider up left join partner p on up.partner_no = p.partner_no left join facility_contract fc on up.cont_no = fc.cont_no left join common_code provider_meter_ty on up.meter_ty_cd = provider_meter_ty.code_no_cd and provider_meter_ty.group_code_no = 'METER_TY' where up.apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo} and up.cont_no is not null and fc.cont_stts_cd = 'ACTIVE' and up.meter_ty_cd is not null order by case up.meter_ty_cd when 'ELEC' then 1 when 'WATER' then 2 when 'GAS' then 3 when 'HEAT' then 4 else 9 end , up.utility_provider_no

select up.utility_provider_no , up.apt_cmplex_no , up.partner_no , up.csv_idntf_key , up.ext_cust_no , up.meter_ty_cd , provider_meter_ty.code_name as meter_ty_nm , up.cont_no , up.rmrk_cn , p.partner_nm , fc.cont_nm , fc.cont_cn , to_char(fc.cont_bgng_dt, 'yyyy.mm.dd') as cont_bgng_dt , to_char(fc.cont_end_dt, 'yyyy.mm.dd') as cont_end_dt from utility_provider up left join partner p on up.partner_no = p.partner_no left join facility_contract fc on up.cont_no = fc.cont_no left join common_code provider_meter_ty on up.meter_ty_cd = provider_meter_ty.code_no_cd and provider_meter_ty.group_code_no = 'METER_TY' where up.apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo} and up.cont_no is not null and fc.cont_stts_cd = 'ACTIVE' and up.meter_ty_cd is not null and exists ( select 1 from meter_hstry mh where mh.utility_provider_no = up.utility_provider_no and mh.meter_scope = #{meterScope} ) order by case up.meter_ty_cd when 'ELEC' then 1 when 'WATER' then 2 when 'GAS' then 3 when 'HEAT' then 4 else 9 end , up.utility_provider_no

select up.utility_provider_no , up.apt_cmplex_no , up.partner_no , up.csv_idntf_key , up.ext_cust_no , up.meter_ty_cd , provider_meter_ty.code_name as meter_ty_nm , up.cont_no , up.rmrk_cn , p.partner_nm , fc.cont_nm , fc.cont_cn from utility_provider up left join partner p on up.partner_no = p.partner_no left join facility_contract fc on up.cont_no = fc.cont_no left join common_code provider_meter_ty on up.meter_ty_cd = provider_meter_ty.code_no_cd and provider_meter_ty.group_code_no = 'METER_TY' where up.apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo} and up.utility_provider_no = #{utilityProviderNo} and fc.cont_stts_cd = 'ACTIVE'

select up.utility_provider_no , up.apt_cmplex_no , up.partner_no , up.csv_idntf_key , up.ext_cust_no , up.meter_ty_cd , provider_meter_ty.code_name as meter_ty_nm , up.cont_no , up.rmrk_cn , p.partner_nm , fc.cont_nm , fc.cont_cn , fc.cont_stts_cd , to_char(fc.cont_bgng_dt, 'yyyy.mm.dd') as cont_bgng_dt , to_char(fc.cont_end_dt, 'yyyy.mm.dd') as cont_end_dt from utility_provider up left join partner p on up.partner_no = p.partner_no left join facility_contract fc on up.cont_no = fc.cont_no left join common_code provider_meter_ty on up.meter_ty_cd = provider_meter_ty.code_no_cd and provider_meter_ty.group_code_no = 'METER_TY' where trim(upper(up.apt_cmplex_no)) = trim(upper(#{aptCmplexNo})) and trim(upper(up.csv_idntf_key)) = trim(upper(#{csvIdntfKey})) and trim(upper(up.ext_cust_no)) = trim(upper(#{extCustNo}))

select code_no_cd as "codeNoCd" , code_name as "codeName" , code_content as "codeContent" , sort_order as "sortOrder" from common_code where group_code_no = 'METER_RSLT' and use_yn = 'Y' order by sort_order

select code_no_cd as "codeNoCd" , code_name as "codeName" , code_content as "codeContent" , sort_order as "sortOrder" from common_code where group_code_no = 'METER_TY' and use_yn = 'Y' order by sort_order
select count(*) from common_code where group_code_no = 'METER_RSLT' and code_no_cd = #{meterRsltCd} and use_yn = 'Y'

select mh.meter_hstry_no , mh.facility_no , f.facility_nm , f.facility_ty_cd , fac_ty.code_name as facility_ty_nm , f.dong_no , f.loc_cn , mh.ho_no , mh.meter_scope , mh.meter_ty_cd , meter_ty.code_name as meter_ty_nm , mh.meter_dt , mh.pre_val , mh.curr_val , mh.meter_cn , mh.meter_rslt_cd , rslt.code_name as meter_rslt_nm , mh.reg_dt , mh.mdf_dt , up.utility_provider_no , p.partner_no , p.partner_nm , fc.cont_no , fc.cont_nm , to_char(fc.cont_bgng_dt, 'yyyy.mm.dd') as cont_bgng_dt , to_char(fc.cont_end_dt, 'yyyy.mm.dd') as cont_end_dt , p.pic_nm , p.pic_telno , p.pic_email from meter_hstry mh left join facility f on mh.facility_no = f.facility_no left join common_code fac_ty on f.facility_ty_cd = fac_ty.code_no_cd and fac_ty.group_code_no = 'FACILITY_TY' left join utility_provider up on mh.utility_provider_no = up.utility_provider_no left join partner p on up.partner_no = p.partner_no left join facility_contract fc on up.cont_no = fc.cont_no left join common_code rslt on mh.meter_rslt_cd = rslt.code_no_cd and rslt.group_code_no = 'METER_RSLT' left join common_code meter_ty on mh.meter_ty_cd = meter_ty.code_no_cd and meter_ty.group_code_no = 'METER_TY' where mh.meter_hstry_no = #{meterHstryNo}
